title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 415.010 - Public warehouses, what constitutes — facilities not included as
text:
415.010.  Public warehouses, what constitutes — facilities not included as. — All warehouses or storehouses situated in cities or towns now having or which shall hereafter have over twenty-five thousand inhabitants, and wherein other property than grain is stored for a compensation or consideration, are declared to be public warehouses.  For the purposes of sections 415.010 to 415.050, the term "public warehouse" shall not include self-service storage facilities governed by sections 415.400 to 415.430.
(RSMo 1939 § 15476, A.L. 1985 H.B. 204) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14352; 1919 § 13450; 1909 § 11946
